app_title: SIUT Pediatric Cardiothoracic Division Haspatal Survey
offline_notice: Aap offline hain. Aap ka jawab mehfooz kar liya gaya hai aur connection bahl honay par bheja jaye ga.
section_admission: Jab Aap Kay Bachay Ko Is Haspatal Mein Daakhil Kiya Gaya
section_care_after_admission: Daakhlay Kay Baad Aap Kay Bachay Ki Dekh Bhaal
section_care_note: Baqi survey kay liye Emergency Room mein mili dekh bhaal shamil na karein.
section_child_nurses: Nurses Kay Saath Aap Kay Bachay Ka Tajurba
section_child_nurses_note: Agli sawaalat aap kay bachay kay nurses aur doctors kay saath tajurbay kay baray mein hain. Aap ka apna tajurba baad mein poocha jaye ga.
section_child_doctors: Doctors Kay Saath Aap Kay Bachay Ka Tajurba
section_parent_nurses: Nurses Kay Saath Aap Ka Tajurba
section_parent_doctors: Doctors Kay Saath Aap Ka Tajurba
section_providers: Sehat Faraham Karnay Walon Kay Saath Aap Ka Tajurba
section_providers_note: Faraham kunandah say murad doctor, nurse, nurse practitioner, ya physician assistant hai.
section_child_care: Is Haspatal Mein Aap Kay Bachay Ki Dekh Bhaal
section_discharge: Jab Aap Ka Bacha Is Haspatal Say Gaya
section_teen: Is Haspatal Mein Aap Kay Nau-umar Bachay Ki Dekh Bhaal
q1: Kya is haspatal qiyaam kay liye aap kay bachay ko is haspatal kay Emergency Room say daakhil kiya gaya tha?
q2: Kya aap apnay bachay kay saath is haspatal kay Emergency Room mein thay?
q3: Jab aap ka bacha is haspatal kay Emergency Room mein tha, kya aap ko khabar rakha gaya keh aap kay bachay kay liye kya kiya ja raha hai?
q4: Haspatal qiyaam kay pehlay din kay dauraan, kya aap say kaha gaya keh aap ka bacha jo tamam nuskhay ki dawaian lay raha tha un ki fehrist banaein ya jaiza lein?
q5: Haspatal qiyaam kay pehlay din kay dauraan, kya aap say kaha gaya keh aap ka bacha ghar mein jo tamam vitamins, jari bootiyon ki dawaian aur baghair nuskhay ki dawaian lay raha tha un ki fehrist banaein ya jaiza lein?
q6: Kya aap ka bacha nurses aur doctors say apni sehat ki dekh bhaal kay baray mein baat kar sakta hai?
q7: Aap kay bachay ki nurses aap kay bachay ki baat kitni baar ghoor say sunti thin?
q8: Aap kay bachay ki nurses kitni baar aap kay bachay ko aasaani say samajh aanay walay tareeqay say cheezein samjhati thin?
q9: Aap kay bachay ki nurses kitni baar aap kay bachay ko sawaalat poochnay ki targheeb deti thin?
q10: Aap kay bachay kay doctors aap kay bachay ki baat kitni baar ghoor say suntay thay?
q11: Aap kay bachay kay doctors kitni baar aap kay bachay ko aasaani say samajh aanay walay tareeqay say cheezein samjhatay thay?
q12: Aap kay bachay kay doctors kitni baar aap kay bachay ko sawaalat poochnay ki targheeb detay thay?
q13: Aap kay bachay ki nurses aap ki baat kitni baar ghoor say sunti thin?
q14: Aap kay bachay ki nurses aap ko kitni baar aasaani say samajh aanay walay tareeqay say cheezein samjhati thin?
q15: Aap kay bachay ki nurses aap kay saath kitni baar shaaistaagi aur ehtaraam say paish aati thin?
q16: Aap kay bachay kay doctors aap ki baat kitni baar ghoor say suntay thay?
q17: Aap kay bachay kay doctors aap ko kitni baar aasaani say samajh aanay walay tareeqay say cheezein samjhatay thay?
q18: Aap kay bachay kay doctors aap kay saath kitni baar shaaistaagi aur ehtaraam say paish aatay thay?
q19: Jab aap faraham kunandagaan kay saath apnay bachay ki dekh bhaal kay baray mein baat kar rahay thay to aap ko kitni baar itni razdaari di gayi jitni aap chahtay thay?
q20: Kya faraham kunandagaan nay aap say un cheezoon kay baray mein poocha jo khaandaan bacha kay baray mein behtar jaanta hai (bacha aam taur par kaisa bartao karta hai, bachay ko kya sukoon deta hai, khauf ko kaise door kiya jaye)?
q21: Faraham kunandagaan nay aap kay bachay say kitni baar us tareeqay say baat ki aur bartao kiya jo aap kay bachay ki umar kay liye munaasib tha?
q22: Faraham kunandagaan nay aap ko kitni baar khabar rakha keh aap kay bachay kay liye kya kiya ja raha hai?
q23: Kya aap kay bachay nay is haspatal qiyaam kay dauraan koi test (khoon kay test, x-ray waghaira) karaye?
q24: Faraham kunandagaan nay aap ko kitni baar in tests kay nataij kay baray mein itni maloomat di jitni aap chahtay thay?
q25: Jab aap ka bacha madad kay liye pukaarta to amlah kitni baar madad kay liye aata tha?
q26: Kya aap kay bachay ko is haspatal qiyaam kay dauraan koi dawaai di gayi?
q27: Kya faraham kunandagaan/amlah nay aap ko bataya keh aap kay bachay ki sehat ki dekh bhaal mein ghaltiyoon kay baray mein (mislan ghalt dawaai, ghalt operation) shikaayat kaise karein?
q28: Kya aap kay bachay ko is haspatal qiyaam kay dauraan aisa dard tha jis kay liye dawaai ya doosray ilaaj ki zaroorat thi?
q29: Faraham kunandagaan/amlah nay aap kay bachay kay dard kay baray mein kitni baar itni baar poocha jitni zaroorat thi?
q30: Aap kay bachay ka kamra aur bathroom kitni baar saaf rakha gaya?
q31: Raat ko aap kay bachay kay kamray kay aas paas ka ilaaqa kitni baar khamosh raha?
q32: Kya haspatal mein aap kay bachay kay liye umar kay mutaabiq cheezein dastiyaab thin (khilonay, kitaabein, mobile, games)?
q33: Aap kay bachay kay jaanay say pehlay, kya kisi faraham kunandah nay aap say poocha keh kya aap ko is baray mein koi tashweesh hai keh aap ka bacha jaanay kay liye tayyar hai?
q34: Aap kay bachay kay jaanay say pehlay, kya kisi faraham kunandah nay aap say itni baat ki jitni aap chahtay thay keh jaanay kay baad aap kay bachay ki sehat ka khayaal kaise rakhein?
q35: Aap kay bachay kay jaanay say pehlay, kya kisi faraham kunandah nay aap ko bataya keh aap kay bachay ko koi nayi dawaai leni chahiye jo is haspatal qiyaam say pehlay nahi li thi?
q36: Aap kay bachay kay jaanay say pehlay, kya kisi faraham kunandah/pharmacist nay waazeh taur par bataya keh jaanay kay baad aap ka bacha ye nayi dawaain kaise lay?
q37: Aap kay bachay kay jaanay say pehlay, kya kisi faraham kunandah/pharmacist nay waazeh taur par in nayi dawaain kay mumkin muzir asraat bataye?
q38: Kya kisi faraham kunandah nay waazeh taur par bataya keh aap ka bacha kab aam sargarmiyan dobara shuru kar sakta hai (khaana, nahaana, school, khail)?
q39: Kya kisi faraham kunandah nay waazeh taur par bataya keh jaanay kay baad kaun si alamaat/sehat kay masaail par nazar rakhein?
q40: Kya aap ko tehriri maloomat mili keh jaanay kay baad kaun si alamaat/sehat kay masaail par nazar rakhein?
q41: Is haspatal qiyaam kay dauraan, kya aap ka bacha 13 saal ya is say bara tha?
q42: Is haspatal qiyaam kay dauraan, faraham kunandagaan nay aap kay bachay ko us ki apni sehat ki dekh bhaal kay baray mein baat cheet mein kitni baar shaamil kiya?
q43: Aap kay bachay kay haspatal say jaanay say pehlay, kya kisi faraham kunandah nay aap kay bachay say poocha keh kya usay is baray mein koi tashweesh hai keh aaya woh jaanay kay liye tayyar hai?
q44: Aap kay bachay kay haspatal say jaanay say pehlay, kya kisi faraham kunandah nay aap kay bachay say baat ki keh haspatal say jaanay kay baad apni sehat ka khayaal kaise rakhe?
q45: 0 say 10 tak koi bhi nambur istemal kartay hue, jahan 0 sab say kharab haspatal aur 10 sab say behtar haspatal hai, aap kay bachay kay qiyaam kay dauraan is haspatal ko kaun sa nambur dein gay?
q46: Kya aap apnay doston aur khaandaan ko ye haspatal taweez karein gay?
section_about_child: Aap Kay Bachay Kay Baray Mein
q47: Aam taur par, aap apnay bachay ki mujooda sehat ko kaise darja dein gay?
q48: Aap kay bachay ki umar kya hai?
q49: Kya aap ka bacha larka hai ya larki?
q50: Aap ka bachay say kya rishta hai?
q52: Aap nay taleem ka sab say uuncha darjah kya mukammal kiya hai?
q53: Aap ki pasandida zaban kya hai?
q54: Aap kay bachay kay haspatal qiyaam kay dauraan, aap kitna waqt haspatal mein thay?
q55: Kya aap apnay bachay ko milnay waali dekh bhaal kay baray mein aur kuch kehna chahtay hain?
q56: Kya kisi nay aap ko ye survey mukammal karnay mein madad ki?
q57: Us shakhs nay aap ki kaise madad ki? (Aik ya zyada nishaan lagaein)
